A01-fitts-law.caption: 目标距离 D 越远、宽度 W 越小，抵达时间 T 越长。
A01-fitts-law.alt: 菲茨定律示意图 — 一个起点与两个尺寸不同、距离不同的目标，标注公式 T = a + b·log₂(D/W + 1)

A02-hicks-law.caption: 选项数量 n 增加，决策时间按 log₂(n+1) 增长。
A02-hicks-law.alt: 希克定律示意图 — 横轴为选项数量、纵轴为决策时间的对数曲线，标注公式 T = b·log₂(n+1)
A02-hicks-law.content: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 320' role='img' aria-label='Hicks Law diagram'><defs><marker id='arH' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='5' refY='5' markerWidth='6' markerHeight='6' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='#6b6859'/></marker></defs><rect width='600' height='320' fill='#f7f6f3'/><g font-family='Inter, sans-serif'><text x='300' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' fill='#6b6859'>HICK'S LAW · 1952</text><text x='300' y='52' text-anchor='middle' font-size='17' font-weight='700' fill='#0d2240'>T = b · log₂( n + 1 )</text><line x1='90' y1='260' x2='540' y2='260' stroke='#6b6859' stroke-width='1.2' marker-end='url(#arH)'/><line x1='90' y1='260' x2='90' y2='80' stroke='#6b6859' stroke-width='1.2' marker-end='url(#arH)'/><text x='540' y='280' font-size='11' fill='#6b6859'>选项数 n</text><text x='70' y='80' font-size='11' fill='#6b6859' text-anchor='end'>决策时间 T</text><path d='M90,260 Q150,180 220,150 T380,115 T530,95' fill='none' stroke='#0d2240' stroke-width='2.5'/><circle cx='150' cy='200' r='4' fill='#6e8a73'/><text x='158' y='198' font-size='10' fill='#6e8a73' font-weight='700'>n=2 快</text><circle cx='300' cy='135' r='4' fill='#d4a948'/><text x='308' y='133' font-size='10' fill='#d4a948' font-weight='700'>n=8</text><circle cx='480' cy='100' r='4' fill='#c46a5e'/><text x='488' y='98' font-size='10' fill='#c46a5e' font-weight='700'>n=20 慢</text><text x='300' y='305' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='#6b6859'>选项越多，决策越慢（对数增长）</text></g></svg>

A03-millers-law.caption: 短时记忆容量约 7±2 项，超过则需分组（chunking）。
A03-millers-law.alt: 米勒定律示意图 — 一行 9 个方块，中间 7 个高亮显示工作记忆容量
A03-millers-law.content: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 320' role='img' aria-label='Millers Law diagram'><rect width='600' height='320' fill='#f7f6f3'/><g font-family='Inter, sans-serif'><text x='300' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' fill='#6b6859'>MILLER'S LAW · 1956</text><text x='300' y='52' text-anchor='middle' font-size='17' font-weight='700' fill='#0d2240'>7 ± 2 chunks</text><rect x='60' y='140' width='50' height='50' rx='6' fill='#f7f6f3' stroke='#c46a5e' stroke-width='1.5' stroke-dasharray='4 3'/><rect x='118' y='140' width='50' height='50' rx='6' fill='#0d2240'/><rect x='176' y='140' width='50' height='50' rx='6' fill='#0d2240'/><rect x='234' y='140' width='50' height='50' rx='6' fill='#0d2240'/><rect x='292' y='140' width='50' height='50' rx='6' fill='#d4a948'/><rect x='350' y='140' width='50' height='50' rx='6' fill='#0d2240'/><rect x='408' y='140' width='50' height='50' rx='6' fill='#0d2240'/><rect x='466' y='140' width='50' height='50' rx='6' fill='#0d2240'/><rect x='524' y='140' width='50' height='50' rx='6' fill='#f7f6f3' stroke='#c46a5e' stroke-width='1.5' stroke-dasharray='4 3'/><text x='85' y='171' text-anchor='middle' font-size='14' fill='#c46a5e' font-weight='700'>−2</text><text x='317' y='171' text-anchor='middle' font-size='14' fill='#f7f6f3' font-weight='700'>7</text><text x='549' y='171' text-anchor='middle' font-size='14' fill='#c46a5e' font-weight='700'>+2</text><path d='M118,215 L516,215' stroke='#0d2240' stroke-width='1.2'/><path d='M118,210 L118,220 M516,210 L516,220' stroke='#0d2240' stroke-width='1.2'/><text x='317' y='235' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12' fill='#0d2240' font-weight='700'>工作记忆容量 5 ~ 9 项</text><text x='300' y='280' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='#6b6859'>超出容量需做分组：13800138000 → 138-0013-8000</text></g></svg>

A04-peak-end-rule.caption: 人们对体验的记忆由峰值与结尾决定，而非平均值。
A04-peak-end-rule.alt: 峰终定律示意图 — 情绪随时间起伏的曲线，标注 PEAK 与 END 两个圈点
A04-peak-end-rule.content: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 320' role='img' aria-label='Peak End Rule diagram'><defs><marker id='arPE' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='5' refY='5' markerWidth='6' markerHeight='6' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='#6b6859'/></marker></defs><rect width='600' height='320' fill='#f7f6f3'/><g font-family='Inter, sans-serif'><text x='300' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' fill='#6b6859'>PEAK-END RULE · 1993</text><text x='300' y='52' text-anchor='middle' font-size='17' font-weight='700' fill='#0d2240'>记忆 ≈ ( PEAK + END ) / 2</text><line x1='70' y1='180' x2='560' y2='180' stroke='#6b6859' stroke-width='1' stroke-dasharray='3 3'/><line x1='70' y1='260' x2='560' y2='260' stroke='#6b6859' stroke-width='1.2' marker-end='url(#arPE)'/><line x1='70' y1='260' x2='70' y2='80' stroke='#6b6859' stroke-width='1.2' marker-end='url(#arPE)'/><text x='560' y='280' font-size='11' fill='#6b6859'>时间</text><text x='60' y='80' font-size='11' fill='#6b6859' text-anchor='end'>情绪</text><text x='60' y='185' font-size='10' fill='#6b6859' text-anchor='end'>中性</text><path d='M70,200 Q120,210 150,195 T220,170 Q260,120 290,100 Q320,85 340,110 Q380,165 420,175 Q460,185 490,150 Q510,130 540,135' fill='none' stroke='#0d2240' stroke-width='2.5'/><circle cx='305' cy='92' r='10' fill='none' stroke='#d4a948' stroke-width='2.5'/><circle cx='305' cy='92' r='4' fill='#d4a948'/><text x='305' y='75' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='#d4a948' font-weight='700'>PEAK 峰值</text><circle cx='540' cy='135' r='10' fill='none' stroke='#6e8a73' stroke-width='2.5'/><circle cx='540' cy='135' r='4' fill='#6e8a73'/><text x='540' y='118' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='#6e8a73' font-weight='700'>END 结尾</text><text x='300' y='305' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='#6b6859'>整段体验的记忆 ≈ 峰值与结尾两个时刻</text></g></svg>

A05-jakobs-law.caption: 用户大部分时间花在别的产品上，因此期望你的产品行为与他们熟悉的一致。
A05-jakobs-law.alt: 雅各布定律示意图 — 两个相似的应用图标，箭头表示用户在多产品间迁移期望

A06-doherty-threshold.caption: 系统响应低于 400ms 时，用户专注度与生产力显著提升。
A06-doherty-threshold.alt: 多尔蒂阈值示意图 — 横轴为响应时间，纵轴为参与度，400ms 处为临界悬崖
A06-doherty-threshold.content: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 320' role='img' aria-label='Doherty Threshold diagram'><defs><marker id='arD' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='5' refY='5' markerWidth='6' markerHeight='6' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='#6b6859'/></marker></defs><rect width='600' height='320' fill='#f7f6f3'/><g font-family='Inter, sans-serif'><text x='300' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' fill='#6b6859'>DOHERTY THRESHOLD · 1982</text><text x='300' y='52' text-anchor='middle' font-size='17' font-weight='700' fill='#0d2240'>响应时间 < 400ms = 心流不中断</text><line x1='80' y1='260' x2='560' y2='260' stroke='#6b6859' stroke-width='1.2' marker-end='url(#arD)'/><line x1='80' y1='260' x2='80' y2='80' stroke='#6b6859' stroke-width='1.2' marker-end='url(#arD)'/><text x='560' y='280' font-size='11' fill='#6b6859'>响应时间 (ms)</text><text x='70' y='80' font-size='11' fill='#6b6859' text-anchor='end'>参与度</text><line x1='280' y1='80' x2='280' y2='260' stroke='#c46a5e' stroke-width='1.5' stroke-dasharray='5 4'/><text x='280' y='75' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12' fill='#c46a5e' font-weight='700'>400ms 阈值</text><path d='M80,110 L180,115 L260,125 L280,135 Q285,180 295,210 L380,235 L500,250' fill='none' stroke='#0d2240' stroke-width='2.5'/><rect x='100' y='95' width='160' height='30' rx='4' fill='#6e8a73' opacity='0.2'/><text x='180' y='115' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='#6e8a73' font-weight='700'>心流区 · 高生产力</text><rect x='300' y='220' width='220' height='30' rx='4' fill='#c46a5e' opacity='0.2'/><text x='410' y='240' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='#c46a5e' font-weight='700'>注意力流失</text><text x='150' y='280' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='#6b6859'>100</text><text x='280' y='280' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='#6b6859'>400</text><text x='450' y='280' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='#6b6859'>1000+</text></g></svg>

A07-teslers-law.caption: 每个系统都有最小复杂度，无法消除，只能在用户与系统之间分配。
A07-teslers-law.alt: 泰斯勒定律示意图 — 一根总复杂度长条被分割为用户承担与系统承担两段
A07-teslers-law.content: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 320' role='img' aria-label='Teslers Law diagram'><rect width='600' height='320' fill='#f7f6f3'/><g font-family='Inter, sans-serif'><text x='300' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' fill='#6b6859'>TESLER'S LAW · 1980s</text><text x='300' y='52' text-anchor='middle' font-size='17' font-weight='700' fill='#0d2240'>复杂度守恒 = 用户复杂度 + 系统复杂度</text><text x='60' y='110' font-size='12' fill='#6b6859' font-weight='700'>方案 A · 用户多扛</text><rect x='60' y='120' width='480' height='32' rx='4' fill='#c46a5e'/><rect x='420' y='120' width='120' height='32' rx='4' fill='#6e8a73'/><text x='240' y='141' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12' fill='#f7f6f3' font-weight='700'>用户复杂度</text><text x='480' y='141' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='#f7f6f3' font-weight='700'>系统</text><text x='60' y='190' font-size='12' fill='#6b6859' font-weight='700'>方案 B · 系统多扛（设计师的工作）</text><rect x='60' y='200' width='480' height='32' rx='4' fill='#6e8a73'/><rect x='60' y='200' width='130' height='32' rx='4' fill='#c46a5e'/><text x='125' y='221' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='#f7f6f3' font-weight='700'>用户</text><text x='365' y='221' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12' fill='#f7f6f3' font-weight='700'>系统复杂度</text><line x1='60' y1='265' x2='540' y2='265' stroke='#0d2240' stroke-width='1.5'/><line x1='60' y1='258' x2='60' y2='272' stroke='#0d2240' stroke-width='1.5'/><line x1='540' y1='258' x2='540' y2='272' stroke='#0d2240' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='300' y='283' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='#0d2240' font-weight='700'>总复杂度恒定 — 设计师的任务是把它从用户挪到系统</text></g></svg>

A08-postels-law.caption: 对输入要宽容，对输出要严格 — 鲁棒性原则。
A08-postels-law.alt: 波斯特尔定律示意图 — 左侧宽口漏斗接受多样输入，右侧窄口漏斗严格输出
A08-postels-law.content: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 320' role='img' aria-label='Postels Law diagram'><defs><marker id='arP' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='5' refY='5' input, strict in output</text><text x='90' y='100' font-size='11' fill='#6e8a73' font-weight='700'>13800138000</text><text x='90' y='118' font-size='11' fill='#6e8a73' font-weight='700'>138 0013 fill='#6b6859'>(标准化输出)</text><text x='300' y='305' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='#6b6859'>容纳人类的混乱，输出机器的整洁</text></g></svg>

A09-aesthetic-usability.caption: 更美观的设计被感知为更易用，即使功能完全相同。
A09-aesthetic-usability.alt: 美观-可用性效应示意图 — 两个相同功能的界面，丑版与美版的感知评分对比

A10-zeigarnik-effect.caption: 未完成的任务比已完成的任务更容易被记住。
A10-zeigarnik-effect.alt: 蔡格尼克效应示意图 — 已完成任务气泡呈现淡化，未完成任务气泡高亮放大

A11-serial-position.caption: 序列首位（primacy）与末位（recency）最易被记住，中段最易遗忘。
A11-serial-position.alt: 序列位置效应示意图 — U 型记忆曲线，首位与末位形成两个高峰
A11-serial-position.content: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 320' role='img' aria-label='Serial Position Effect diagram'><defs><marker id='arS' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='5' A13-pareto-principle.caption: 约 80% 的结果来自 20% 的原因 — 资源分配的黄金比。
A13-pareto-principle.alt: 帕累托原理示意图 — 上下两条 20/80 分割条，呈现因与果的不对称关系
A13-pareto-principle.content: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 320' role='img' aria-label='Pareto Principle diagram'><defs><marker id='arPa' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='5' refY='5' markerWidth='6' markerHeight='6' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='#d4a948'/></marker></defs><rect width='600' height='320' fill='#f7f6f3'/><g font-family='Inter, sans-serif'><text x='300' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' fill='#6b6859'>PARETO PRINCIPLE · 1896</text><text x='300' y='52' text-anchor='middle' font-size='17' font-weight='700' fill='#0d2240'>80 / 20 法则</text><text x='60' y='115' font-size='12' fill='#6b6859' font-weight='700'>原因</text><rect x='110' y='100' width='100' height='32' fill='#d4a948'/><rect x='210' y='100' width='380' height='32' fill='#6b6859' opacity='0.3'/><text x='160' y='121' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12' fill='#f7f6f3' font-weight='700'>20%</text><text x='400' y='121' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12' fill='#6b6859' font-weight='700'>80%</text><path d='M160,140 Q160,170 200,180' fill='none' stroke='#d4a948' stroke-width='2' marker-end='url(#arPa)'/><path d='M400,140 Q400,170 480,180' fill='none' stroke='#6b6859' stroke-width='1.5' opacity='0.5' stroke-dasharray='4 3' marker-end='url(#arPa)'/><text x='60' y='215' font-size='12' fill='#6b6859' font-weight='700'>结果</text><rect x='110' y='200' width='380' height='32' fill='#0d2240'/><rect x='490' y='200' width='100' height='32' fill='#6b6859' opacity='0.3'/><text x='300' y='221' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12' fill='#f7f6f3' font-weight='700'>80%</text><text x='540' y='221' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12' fill='#6b6859' font-weight='700'>20%</text><text x='300' y='270' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='#0d2240' font-weight='700'>20% 的功能 / 用户 / 客户 → 80% 的价值</text><text x='300' y='295' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='#6b6859'>识别那 20%，把资源压上去</text></g></svg>

A14-parkinsons-law.caption: 工作会膨胀到填满所有可用时间。
A14-parkinsons-law.alt: 帕金森定律示意图 — 时间气球从短到长，工作量同步膨胀
A14-parkinsons-law.content: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 320' role='img' aria-label='Parkinsons Law diagram'><rect width='600' height='320' fill='#f7f6f3'/><g font-family='Inter, sans-serif'><text x='300' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' fill='#6b6859'>PARKINSON'S LAW · 1955</text><text x='300' y='52' text-anchor='middle' font-size='17' font-weight='700' fill='#0d2240'>工作量 = 可用时间</text><ellipse cx='130' cy='180' rx='55' ry='65' fill='#6e8a73' opacity='0.3' stroke='#6e8a73' stroke-width='2'/><text x='130' y='178' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12' fill='#0d2240' font-weight='700'>给 1 天</text><text x='130' y='196' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='#6b6859'>做完</text><line x1='130' y1='245' x2='130' y2='265' stroke='#6e8a73' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='130' y='285' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='#6e8a73'>截止 1 天</text><ellipse cx='320' cy='180' rx='85' ry='90' fill='#d4a948' opacity='0.3' stroke='#d4a948' stroke-width='2'/><text x='320' y='175' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' fill='#0d2240' font-weight='700'>给 1 周</text><text x='320' y='195' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='#6b6859'>也"刚好做完"</text><line x1='320' y1='270' x2='320' y2='290' stroke='#d4a948' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='320' y='310' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='#d4a948'>截止 1 周</text><ellipse cx='505' cy='180' rx='65' ry='110' fill='#c46a5e' opacity='0.25' stroke='#c46a5e' stroke-width='2'/><text x='505' y='178' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12' fill='#0d2240' font-weight='700'>给 1 月</text><text x='505' y='196' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='#6b6859'>仍刚好做完</text><line x1='505' y1='290' x2='505' y2='305' stroke='#c46a5e' stroke-width='1.5'/></g></svg>

A17-choice-overload.caption: 选项过多反而降低满意度与决策意愿 — 倒 U 型关系。
A17-choice-overload.alt: 选择过载示意图 — 横轴为选项数，纵轴为满意度，呈倒 U 形曲线
A17-choice-overload.content: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 320' role='img' aria-label='Choice Overload diagram'><defs><marker id='arC' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='5' refY='5' markerWidth='6' markerHeight='6' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='#6b6859'/></marker></defs><rect width='600' height='320' fill='#f7f6f3'/><g font-family='Inter, sans-serif'><text x='300' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' fill='#6b6859'>CHOICE OVERLOAD · 2000</text><text x='300' y='52' text-anchor='middle' font-size='17' font-weight='700' fill='#0d2240'>果酱实验 · 倒 U 型满意度</text><line x1='80' y1='250' x2='540' y2='250' stroke='#6b6859' stroke-width='1.2' marker-end='url(#arC)'/><line x1='80' y1='250' x2='80' y2='80' stroke='#6b6859' stroke-width='1.2' marker-end='url(#arC)'/><text x='540' y='270' font-size='11' fill='#6b6859'>选项数量</text><text x='70' y='80' font-size='11' fill='#6b6859' text-anchor='end'>满意度 / 转化率</text><path d='M100,230 Q160,170 250,110 Q310,90 370,110 Q450,150 520,235' fill='none' stroke='#0d2240' stroke-width='2.5'/><circle cx='310' cy='95' r='6' fill='#d4a948'/><text x='310' y='80' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='#d4a948' font-weight='700'>最优 5-7 项</text><line x1='310' y1='100' x2='310' y2='250' stroke='#d4a948' stroke-width='1' stroke-dasharray='3 3'/><circle cx='110' cy='225' r='4' fill='#c46a5e'/><text x='110' y='218' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='#c46a5e'>太少</text><circle cx='510' cy='225' r='4' fill='#c46a5e'/><text x='510' y='218' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='#c46a5e'>过载</text><g font-size='10' fill='#6b6859'><text x='110' y='280' text-anchor='middle'>2</text><text x='310' y='280' text-anchor='middle'>6</text><text x='510' y='280' text-anchor='middle'>24+</text></g><text x='300' y='305' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='#6b6859'>24 种果酱购买率 3% < 6 种果酱购买率 30%</text></g></svg>

A18-decoy-effect.caption: 引入一个明显较差的选项（诱饵），让目标选项显得更优。

B03-similarity.caption: 相似律：相同形状/颜色的元素被自动归为一组。
B03-similarity.alt: 5x5 网格的圆与方块混排，方块构成 X 形被视为整体。
B03-similarity.content: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 320' role='img' aria-label='Similarity'><rect width='600' height='320' fill='#f7f6f3'/><g font-family='Inter, sans-serif'><text x='300' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' fill='#6b6859'>SIMILARITY · 相似律</text><text x='300' y='52' text-anchor='middle' font-size='17' font-weight='700' fill='#0d2240'>形状/颜色相同 = 同一组</text></g><g transform='translate(200,90)'><g fill='#6b6859'><circle cx='0' cy='0' r='10'/><rect x='30' y='-10' width='20' height='20' fill='#c46a5e'/><circle cx='80' cy='0' r='10'/><circle cx='120' cy='0' r='10'/><rect x='150' y='-10' width='20' height='20' fill='#c46a5e'/><circle cx='0' cy='40' r='10'/><circle cx='40' cy='40' r='10'/><rect x='70' y='30' width='20' height='20' fill='#c46a5e'/><circle cx='120' cy='40' r='10'/><circle cx='160' cy='40' r='10'/><rect x='-10' y='70' width='20' height='20' fill='#c46a5e'/><circle cx='40' cy='80' r='10'/><circle cx='80' cy='80' r='10'/><circle cx='120' cy='80' r='10'/><rect x='150' y='70' width='20' height='20' fill='#c46a5e'/><circle cx='0' cy='120' r='10'/><rect x='30' y='110' width='20' height='20' fill='#c46a5e'/><circle cx='80' cy='120' r='10'/><rect x='110' y='110' width='20' height='20' fill='#c46a5e'/><circle cx='160' cy='120' r='10'/></g></g><text x='300' y='285' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12' fill='#c46a5e' font-family='Inter, sans-serif' font-weight='700'>红色方块自动被感知为同一组</text></svg>

B04-closure.caption: 闭合律：缺口图形会被大脑自动补完 — 经典 Kanizsa 三角形。
B04-closure.alt: 三个 Pac-Man 缺口圆与三个 V 形排成三角形，大脑自动补出一个不存在的白色三角形。
B04-closure.content: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 320' role='img' aria-label='Closure'><rect width='600' height='320' fill='#f7f6f3'/><g font-family='Inter, sans-serif'><text x='300' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' fill='#6b6859'>CLOSURE · 闭合律 · KANIZSA 1955</text><text x='300' y='52' text-anchor='middle' font-size='17' font-weight='700' fill='#0d2240'>大脑会自动补完缺失的轮廓</text></g><g transform='translate(300,180)'><path d='M-100,-70 A40,40 0 1,1 -72,-30 L-100,-30 Z' fill='#0d2240'/><path d='M100,-70 A40,40 0 1,0 72,-30 L100,-30 Z' fill='#0d2240'/><path d='M0,75 A40,40 0 1,0 -28,35 L0,35 Z' fill='#0d2240' transform='rotate(180)'/><path d='M-100,-30 L100,-30 L0,143 Z' fill='none' stroke='#c46a5e' stroke-width='1.5' stroke-dasharray='5 3' opacity='0.7'/></g><text x='300' y='300' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12' fill='#c46a5e' font-family='Inter, sans-serif' font-weight='700'>虚线三角形并不存在 — 是大脑补出来的</text></svg>

B05-continuity.caption: 连续律：眼睛倾向沿平滑路径而非突然转折追随线条。
B05-continuity.alt: 两条曲线交叉，视觉上自动延续为两条独立的平滑路径。
B05-continuity.content: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 320' role='img' aria-label='Continuity'><rect width='600' height='320' fill='#f7f6f3'/><g font-family='Inter, sans-serif'><text x='300' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' fill='#6b6859'>CONTINUITY · 连续律</text><text x='300' y='52' text-anchor='middle' font-size='17' font-weight='700' fill='#0d2240'>视觉沿最平滑的路径延伸</text></g><path d='M60,100 Q300,100 540,220' fill='none' stroke='#0d2240' stroke-width='4'/><path d='M60,220 Q300,220 540,100' fill='none' stroke='#c46a5e' stroke-width='4'/><circle cx='60' cy='100' r='6' fill='#0d2240'/><circle cx='540' cy='220' r='6' fill='#0d2240'/><circle cx='60' cy='220' r='6' fill='#c46a5e'/><circle cx='540' cy='100' r='6' fill='#c46a5e'/><g font-family='Inter, sans-serif' font-size='11' fill='#6b6859'><text x='45' y='95' text-anchor='end'>A 起</text><text x='555' y='225' text-anchor='start'>A 终</text><text x='45' y='225' text-anchor='end'>B 起</text><text x='555' y='95' text-anchor='start'>B 终</text></g><text x='300' y='295' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12' fill='#6e8a73' font-family='Inter, sans-serif' font-weight='700'>大脑感知为 2 条交叉曲线，而非 4 个折角片段</text></svg>

B06-common-region.caption: 共域律：被同一边界（卡片、面板、底色）包围的元素被视为一组。
B06-common-region.alt: 六个相同小圆，两两被矩形边框圈起，感知为 3 组。
B06-common-region.content: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 320' role='img' aria-label='Common Region'><rect width='600' height='320' fill='#f7f6f3'/><g font-family='Inter, sans-serif'><text x='300' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' fill='#6b6859'>COMMON REGION · 共域律 · PALMER 1992</text><text x='300' y='52' text-anchor='middle' font-size='17' font-weight='700' fill='#0d2240'>同一容器内的元素被视为一组</text></g><g><rect x='70' y='130' width='140' height='80' rx='10' fill='#fff' stroke='#6e8a73' stroke-width='2'/><circle cx='110' cy='170' r='14' fill='#0d2240'/><circle cx='170' cy='170' r='14' fill='#0d2240'/><rect x='230' y='130' width='140' height='80' rx='10' fill='#fff' stroke='#6e8a73' stroke-width='2'/><circle cx='270' cy='170' r='14' fill='#0d2240'/><circle cx='330' cy='170' r='14' fill='#0d2240'/><rect x='390' y='130' width='140' height='80' rx='10' fill='#fff' stroke='#6e8a73' stroke-width='2'/><circle cx='430' cy='170' r='14' fill='#0d2240'/><circle cx='490' cy='170' r='14' fill='#0d2240'/></g><g font-family='Inter, sans-serif' font-size='11' fill='#6b6859' text-anchor='middle'><text x='140' y='235'>组 1</text><text x='300' y='235'>组 2</text><text x='460' y='235'>组 3</text></g><text x='300' y='285' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12' fill='#6e8a73' font-family='Inter, sans-serif' font-weight='700'>距离一样 + 形状一样，但靠边框分成 3 组</text></svg>

B07-common-fate.caption: 共同命运律：朝同方向移动的元素被视为一组。
B07-common-fate.alt: 六支箭头，五支向上一支向下；向上的五支被感知为一组。
B07-common-fate.content: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 320' role='img' aria-label='Common Fate'><rect width='600' height='320' fill='#f7f6f3'/><defs><marker id='cfu' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='5' refY='5' markerWidth='6' markerHeight='6' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='#0d2240'/></marker><marker id='cfd' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='5' refY='5' markerWidth='6' markerHeight='6' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='#c46a5e'/></marker></defs><g font-family='Inter, sans-serif'><text x='300' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' fill='#6b6859'>COMMON FATE · 共同命运</text><text x='300' y='52' text-anchor='middle' font-size='17' font-weight='700' fill='#0d2240'>同方向运动 = 同一组</text></g><g stroke-width='3' fill='none'><line x1='110' y1='240' x2='110' y2='110' stroke='#0d2240' marker-end='url(#cfu)'/><line x1='170' y1='240' x2='170' y2='110' stroke='#0d2240' marker-end='url(#cfu)'/><line x1='230' y1='240' x2='230' y2='110' stroke='#0d2240' marker-end='url(#cfu)'/><line x1='290' y1='240' x2='290' y2='110' stroke='#0d2240' marker-end='url(#cfu)'/><line x1='350' y1='240' x2='350' y2='110' stroke='#0d2240' marker-end='url(#cfu)'/><line x1='450' y1='110' x2='450' y2='240' stroke='#c46a5e' marker-end='url(#cfd)'/></g><rect x='90' y='95' width='280' height='160' fill='none' stroke='#0d2240' stroke-dasharray='4 3' opacity='0.4'/><rect x='430' y='95' width='40' height='160' fill='none' stroke='#c46a5e' stroke-dasharray='4 3' opacity='0.6'/><g font-family='Inter, sans-serif' font-size='11' fill='#6b6859' text-anchor='middle'><text x='230' y='280' fill='#0d2240' font-weight='700'>组 A（向上）</text><text x='450' y='280' fill='#c46a5e' font-weight='700'>异类</text></g></svg>

B08-figure-ground.caption: 图地反转：经典 Rubin 花瓶 — 看到的是花瓶还是两张人脸？
B08-figure-ground.alt: Rubin 花瓶错觉：黑色背景上的白花瓶轮廓同时也是两张相对而望的人脸侧影。
B08-figure-ground.content: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 320' role='img' aria-label='Figure Ground Rubin Vase'><rect width='600' height='320' fill='#f7f6f3'/><g font-family='Inter, sans-serif'><text x='300' y='26' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' fill='#6b6859'>FIGURE-GROUND · RUBIN VASE · 1915</text><text x='300' y='48' text-anchor='middle' font-size='17' font-weight='700' fill='#0d2240'>图与地的反转</text></g><rect x='200' y='70' width='200' height='220' fill='#0d2240'/><path d='M240,70 C240,100 270,110 270,140 C270,170 240,180 240,210 C240,250 280,275 300,290 C320,275 360,250 360,210 C360,180 330,170 330,140 C330,110 360,100 360,70 Z' fill='#f7f6f3'/><g font-family='Inter, sans-serif' font-size='11' fill='#6b6859'><text x='100' y='160' text-anchor='middle' fill='#c46a5e' font-weight='700'>← 看见两张脸</text><text x='100' y='178' text-anchor='middle'>(黑色为图)</text><text x='500' y='160' text-anchor='middle' fill='#d4a948' font-weight='700'>看见花瓶 →</text><text x='500' y='178' text-anchor='middle'>(白色为图)</text></g><text x='300' y='312' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='#6b6859' font-family='Inter, sans-serif'>同一张图，前景/背景的归属决定你看见什么</text></svg>

B09-pragnanz.caption: 完形（简洁）律：大脑倾向把复杂图形解读为最简洁的形态。
B09-pragnanz.alt: 重叠的圆和三角形被自动感知为独立完整图形，而非一团复杂多边形。
B09-pragnanz.content: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 320' role='img' aria-label='Pragnanz'><rect width='600' height='320' fill='#f7f6f3'/><g font-family='Inter, sans-serif'><text x='300' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' fill='#6b6859'>PRÄGNANZ · 完形（简洁）律</text><text x='300' y='52' text-anchor='middle' font-size='17' font-weight='700' fill='#0d2240'>大脑选择最简单的解释</text></g><g><circle cx='180' cy='170' r='55' fill='none' stroke='#0d2240' stroke-width='2.5'/><rect x='150' y='150' width='80' height='60' fill='none' stroke='#c46a5e' stroke-width='2.5'/><path d='M210,130 L260,210 L160,210 Z' fill='none' stroke='#d4a948' stroke-width='2.5'/><text x='180' y='265' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='#6b6859' font-family='Inter, sans-serif'>感知为：圆 + 矩形 + 三角形</text><text x='180' y='282' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='#6b6859' font-family='Inter, sans-serif'>（而非一个复杂的多边形）</text></g><text x='340' y='160' font-size='30' fill='#6e8a73' font-family='Inter, sans-serif'>→</text><g transform='translate(400,110)'><circle cx='40' cy='40' r='30' fill='#0d2240' opacity='0.15'/><rect x='40' y='80' width='60' height='40' fill='#c46a5e' opacity='0.15'/><path d='M120,40 L155,100 L85,100 Z' fill='#d4a948' opacity='0.2'/></g><text x='480' y='265' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='#6b6859' font-family='Inter, sans-serif'>而不是 1 团复杂图形</text></svg>

B10-symmetry-order.caption: 对称律：对称排列的元素被感知为整体，即使它们物理上分离。
B10-symmetry-order.alt: 三对方括号 ][ 各自被视为一对，由对称性产生分组。
B10-symmetry-order.content: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 320' role='img' aria-label='Symmetry'><rect width='600' height='320' fill='#f7f6f3'/><g font-family='Inter, sans-serif'><text x='300' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' fill='#6b6859'>SYMMETRY · 对称律</text><text x='300' y='52' text-anchor='middle' font-size='17' font-weight='700' fill='#0d2240'>对称的两侧自动配对</text></g><g font-family='Inter, sans-serif' font-size='80' fill='#0d2240' text-anchor='middle'><text x='130' y='190'>]</text><text x='180' y='190'>[</text><text x='280' y='190'>]</text><text x='330' y='190'>[</text><text x='430' y='190'>]</text><text x='480' y='190'>[</text></g><g><rect x='105' y='110' width='100' height='100' fill='none' stroke='#c46a5e' stroke-width='1.5' stroke-dasharray='4 3'/><rect x='255' y='110' width='100' height='100' fill='none' stroke='#c46a5e' stroke-width='1.5' stroke-dasharray='4 3'/><rect x='405' y='110' width='100' height='100' fill='none' stroke='#c46a5e' stroke-width='1.5' stroke-dasharray='4 3'/></g><g font-family='Inter, sans-serif' font-size='11' fill='#c46a5e' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700'><text x='155' y='245'>对 1</text><text x='305' y='245'>对 2</text><text x='455' y='245'>对 3</text></g><text x='300' y='285' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12' fill='#6b6859' font-family='Inter, sans-serif'>对称镜像自动配对，而非按相邻距离分组</text></svg>

C01-norman-principles.caption: Norman 六大设计原则 — 可见性、反馈、约束、映射、可供性、一致性。
C01-norman-principles.alt: 六宫格列出 Norman 在《设计心理学》中的六大基本原则。
C01-norman-principles.content: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 320' role='img' aria-label='Norman Principles'><rect width='600' height='320' fill='#f7f6f3'/><g font-family='Inter, sans-serif'><text x='300' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' fill='#6b6859'>NORMAN'S PRINCIPLES · DESIGN OF EVERYDAY THINGS · 1988</text><text x='300' y='50' text-anchor='middle' font-size='16' font-weight='700' fill='#0d2240'>六大设计基本原则</text></g><g font-family='Inter, sans-serif'><g transform='translate(40,75)'><rect width='170' height='70' rx='6' fill='#fff' stroke='#0d2240' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='85' y='30' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' font-weight='700' fill='#0d2240'>1. 可见性</text><text x='85' y='48' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='#6b6859'>Visibility</text><text x='85' y='62' text-anchor='middle' font-size='9' fill='#6b6859'>用户能看到可做什么</text></g><g transform='translate(220,75)'><rect width='170' height='70' rx='6' fill='#fff' stroke='#c46a5e' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='85' y='30' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' font-weight='700' fill='#c46a5e'>2. 反馈</text><text x='85' y='48' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='#6b6859'>Feedback</text><text x='85' y='62' text-anchor='middle' font-size='9' fill='#6b6859'>每次操作有响应</text></g><g transform='translate(400,75)'><rect width='170' height='70' rx='6' fill='#fff' stroke='#d4a948' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='85' y='30' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' font-weight='700' fill='#d4a948'>3. 约束</text><text x='85' y='48' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='#6b6859'>Constraints</text><text x='85' y='62' text-anchor='middle' font-size='9' fill='#6b6859'>限制错误的可能</text></g><g transform='translate(40,160)'><rect width='170' height='70' rx='6' fill='#fff' stroke='#6e8a73' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='85' y='30' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' font-weight='700' fill='#6e8a73'>4. 映射</text><text x='85' y='48' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='#6b6859'>Mapping</text><text x='85' y='62' text-anchor='middle' font-size='9' fill='#6b6859'>控制器对应控制对象</text></g><g transform='translate(220,160)'><rect width='170' height='70' rx='6' fill='#fff' stroke='#4a7ca6' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='85' y='30' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' font-weight='700' fill='#4a7ca6'>5. 可供性</text><text x='85' y='48' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='#6b6859'>Affordance</text><text x='85' y='62' text-anchor='middle' font-size='9' fill='#6b6859'>形态暗示用法</text></g><g transform='translate(400,160)'><rect width='170' height='70' rx='6' fill='#fff' stroke='#6b6859' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='85' y='30' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' font-weight='700' fill='#6b6859'>6. 一致性</text><text x='85' y='48' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='#6b6859'>Consistency</text><text x='85' y='62' text-anchor='middle' font-size='9' fill='#6b6859'>同类操作同样表现</text></g></g><text x='300' y='275' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='#6b6859' font-family='Inter, sans-serif' font-style='italic'>「好设计是看不见的；只有坏设计才会被注意到」 — Don Norman</text></svg>

C03-mental-model.caption: 心智模型 vs 系统模型：两者越接近，用户越好上手。
C03-mental-model.alt: 左侧用户脑中的心智模型与右侧系统实际模型，中间用箭头标注「映射缺口」。
C03-mental-model.content: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 320' role='img' aria-label='Mental Model'><rect width='600' height='320' fill='#f7f6f3'/><g font-family='Inter, sans-serif'><text x='300' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' fill='#6b6859'>MENTAL MODEL · 心智模型</text><text x='300' y='50' text-anchor='middle' font-size='16' font-weight='700' fill='#0d2240'>用户脑中的模型 vs 系统真实模型</text></g><g transform='translate(60,100)'><ellipse cx='90' cy='80' rx='90' ry='70' fill='#fff' stroke='#0d2240' stroke-width='2'/><text x='90' y='50' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12' font-weight='700' fill='#0d2240' font-family='Inter, sans-serif'>用户心智模型</text><text x='90' y='75' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='#6b6859' font-family='Inter, sans-serif'>「点这个按钮</text><text x='90' y='90' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='#6b6859' font-family='Inter, sans-serif'>就能发消息」</text><text x='90' y='115' text-anchor='middle' font-size='9' fill='#6b6859' font-family='Inter, sans-serif'>简化、直觉、有时错</text></g><g transform='translate(360,100)'><ellipse cx='90' cy='80' rx='90' ry='70' fill='#fff' stroke='#c46a5e' stroke-width='2'/><text x='90' y='50' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12' font-weight='700' fill='#c46a5e' font-family='Inter, sans-serif'>系统真实模型</text><text x='90' y='72' text-anchor='middle' font-size='9' fill='#6b6859' font-family='Inter, sans-serif'>HTTPS 加密 → 队列</text><text x='90' y='86' text-anchor='middle' font-size='9' fill='#6b6859' font-family='Inter, sans-serif'>→ 数据库 → 推送</text><text x='90' y='115' text-anchor='middle' font-size='9' fill='#6b6859' font-family='Inter, sans-serif'>真实、复杂、技术性</text></g><g><line x1='240' y1='180' x2='360' y2='180' stroke='#d4a948' stroke-width='2' stroke-dasharray='6 3'/><text x='300' y='170' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12' font-weight='700' fill='#d4a948' font-family='Inter, sans-serif'>映射缺口</text><text x='300' y='200' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='#6b6859' font-family='Inter, sans-serif'>缺口越小 → 越易用</text></g></svg>

C04-gulf-execution-evaluation.caption: Norman 双鸿沟：执行鸿沟（意图→操作）与评估鸿沟（结果→理解）。
C04-gulf-execution-evaluation.alt: 用户 ↔ 世界，左侧执行鸿沟，右侧评估鸿沟，构成一个闭环。
C04-gulf-execution-evaluation.content: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 320' role='img' aria-label='Gulfs'><rect width='600' height='320' fill='#f7f6f3'/><defs><marker id='gae' C05-seven-stages.caption: Norman 七阶段行动循环：目标 → 计划 → 指定 → 执行 → 感知 → 解读 → 评价。
C05-seven-stages.alt: 7 个阶段排成环形：上半执行链（目标→计划→指定→执行），下半评估链（感知→解读→评价）。

C06-emotional-design.caption: Norman 情感设计三层：本能 · 行为 · 反思。
C06-emotional-design.alt: 三层同心圆，从内到外依次为本能层、行为层、反思层。
C06-emotional-design.content: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 320' role='img' aria-label='Emotional Design'><rect width='600' height='320' fill='#f7f6f3'/><g font-family='Inter, sans-serif'><text x='300' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' fill='#6b6859'>EMOTIONAL DESIGN · NORMAN 2004</text><text x='300' y='50' text-anchor='middle' font-size='16' font-weight='700' fill='#0d2240'>情感设计三层模型</text></g><g transform='translate(220,180)'><circle r='110' fill='#fff' stroke='#0d2240' stroke-width='2'/><circle r='75' fill='#fff' stroke='#c46a5e' stroke-width='2'/><circle r='40' fill='#fff' stroke='#d4a948' stroke-width='2'/><text y='3' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12' font-weight='700' fill='#d4a948' font-family='Inter, sans-serif'>本能</text><text y='17' text-anchor='middle' font-size='9' fill='#6b6859' font-family='Inter, sans-serif'>Visceral</text><text y='-55' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12' font-weight='700' fill='#c46a5e' font-family='Inter, sans-serif'>行为</text><text y='-42' text-anchor='middle' font-size='9' fill='#6b6859' font-family='Inter, sans-serif'>Behavioral</text><text y='-90' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12' font-weight='700' fill='#0d2240' font-family='Inter, sans-serif'>反思</text><text y='-77' text-anchor='middle' font-size='9' fill='#6b6859' font-family='Inter, sans-serif'>Reflective</text></g><g font-family='Inter, sans-serif' font-size='11' fill='#6b6859'><text x='400' y='100' font-weight='700' fill='#d4a948'>本能层</text><text x='400' y='118'>第一眼好看 — 颜色、形态</text><text x='400' y='150' font-weight='700' fill='#c46a5e'>行为层</text><text x='400' y='168'>用起来顺手 — 性能、易用</text><text x='400' y='200' font-weight='700' fill='#0d2240'>反思层</text><text x='400' y='218'>用完想起来 — 意义、自我</text><text x='400' y='250' font-style='italic' fill='#6b6859'>三层都打中 = 让人爱</text></g></svg>

C07-crap.caption: Robin Williams 的 C.R.A.P.：对比 / 重复 / 对齐 / 相近。
C07-crap.alt: 四宫格分别演示对比、重复、对齐、相近 4 个平面设计基本原则。

C08-visual-hierarchy.caption: 视觉层级：通过大小、粗细、颜色等差异引导阅读顺序。
C08-visual-hierarchy.alt: 三段标题级别 XL/L/M 从大到小排列，体现重要性递减。
C08-visual-hierarchy.content: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 320' role='img' aria-label='Visual Hierarchy'><rect width='600' height='320' fill='#f7f6f3'/><g font-family='Inter, sans-serif'><text x='300' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' fill='#6b6859'>VISUAL HIERARCHY · 视觉层级</text><text x='300' y='50' text-anchor='middle' font-size='16' font-weight='700' fill='#0d2240'>大小决定眼睛先看哪里</text></g><g font-family='Inter, sans-serif'><text x='60' y='110' font-size='36' font-weight='800' fill='#0d2240'>主标题</text><text x='60' y='160' font-size='22' font-weight='600' fill='#0d2240'>副标题</text><text x='60' y='200' font-size='14' fill='#6b6859'>正文 — 用最普通的字号承载具体信息和细节内容。</text><text x='60' y='220' font-size='14' fill='#6b6859'>读者会按视觉重量从大到小依次扫描。</text></g><g font-family='Inter, sans-serif' font-size='11' fill='#c46a5e' font-weight='700'><circle cx='420' cy='100' r='14' fill='#c46a5e'/><text x='420' y='105' text-anchor='middle' fill='#fff'>1</text><text x='445' y='105'>最先被看到</text><circle cx='420' cy='150' r='14' fill='#d4a948'/><text x='420' y='155' text-anchor='middle' fill='#fff'>2</text><text x='445' y='155' fill='#d4a948'>第二关注</text><circle cx='420' cy='210' r='14' fill='#6e8a73'/><text x='420' y='215' text-anchor='middle' fill='#fff'>3</text><text x='445' y='215' fill='#6e8a73'>需要才阅读</text></g><text x='300' y='290' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='#6b6859' font-family='Inter, sans-serif' font-style='italic'>层级 = 大小 × 粗细 × 颜色 × 位置</text></svg>

C11-golden-ratio.alt: 黄金矩形递归分割成正方形，叠加对数螺旋曲线。

C12-rule-of-thirds.caption: 三分法则：把画面三等分，主体落在交点或线上最有张力。
C12-rule-of-thirds.alt: 矩形画面被 3x3 网格分割，主体放在右上交点。

C13-typography.caption: 字体层级：H1/H2/H3/Body 形成清晰的阅读节奏。

H03-apple-ml-hig.content: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 320' role='img' aria-label='Apple ML HIG'><rect width='600' height='320' fill='#f7f6f3'/><g font-family='Inter, sans-serif'><text x='300' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' fill='#6b6859'>APPLE MACHINE LEARNING HIG</text><text x='300' y='50' text-anchor='middle' font-size='15' font-weight='700' fill='#0d2240'>AI 能力 · 用户控制 · 隐私优先</text></g><rect x='200' y='75' width='200' height='230' rx='24' fill='#fff' stroke='#0d2240' stroke-width='2'/><rect x='215' y='90' width='170' height='4' rx='2' fill='#0d2240'/><g font-family='Inter, sans-serif'><rect x='220' y='110' width='160' height='50' rx='8' fill='#f7f6f3' stroke='#d4a948'/><text x='230' y='128' font-size='10' fill='#d4a948' font-weight='700'>AI 推荐</text><text x='230' y='145' font-size='11' fill='#0d2240'>给你推荐的播客</text><text x='230' y='155' font-size='9' fill='#6b6859'>基于你最近的收听</text><rect x='220' y='170' width='160' height='30' rx='6' fill='#f7f6f3'/><text x='230' y='189' font-size='11' fill='#0d2240'>个性化推荐</text><circle cx='362' cy='185' r='10' fill='#6e8a73'/><circle cx='366' cy='185' r='10' fill='#fff'/><rect x='220' y='208' width='160' height='30' rx='6' fill='#f7f6f3'/><text x='230' y='227' font-size='11' fill='#0d2240'>使用我的数据</text><circle cx='362' cy='223' r='10' fill='#6b6859'/><circle cx='358' cy='223' r='10' fill='#fff'/><rect x='220' y='248' width='160' height='40' rx='6' fill='#0d2240'/><text x='300' y='264' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='#fff'>隐私徽章</text><text x='300' y='278' text-anchor='middle' font-size='9' fill='#d4a948'>设备端处理 · 数据不上传</text></g><text x='100' y='180' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='#6e8a73' font-family='Inter, sans-serif' font-weight='700'>明确 AI 来源</text><text x='500' y='180' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='#c46a5e' font-family='Inter, sans-serif' font-weight='700'>随时关闭/退出</text></svg>

H04-xai-five-principles.caption: 可解释 AI 的五项原则形成五角星：解释/有意义/准确/知识边界/置信度。
H04-xai-five-principles.alt: XAI 五原则 — 五角星顶点分别标注 Explanation / Meaningful / Accuracy / Knowledge Limits / Confidence。
H04-xai-five-principles.content: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 320' role='img' aria-label='Explainable AI Five Principles'><rect width='600' height='320' fill='#f7f6f3'/><g font-family='Inter, sans-serif'><text x='300' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' fill='#6b6859'>EXPLAINABLE AI · NIST 2020</text><text x='300' y='50' text-anchor='middle' font-size='15' font-weight='700' fill='#0d2240'>可解释 AI · 5 项原则</text></g><polygon points='300,90 343,217 235,140 365,140 257,217' fill='none' stroke='#d4a948' stroke-width='2.5'/><circle cx='300' cy='180' r='25' fill='#0d2240'/><text x='300' y='185' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' font-weight='700' fill='#fff' font-family='Inter, sans-serif'>XAI</text><g font-family='Inter, sans-serif' font-size='11' fill='#0d2240' font-weight='700'><text x='300' y='83' text-anchor='middle' fill='#c46a5e'>Explanation</text><text x='300' y='98' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='400' font-size='9' fill='#6b6859'>解释</text><text x='380' y='140' text-anchor='start' fill='#4a7ca6'>Meaningful</text><text x='380' y='154' font-weight='400' font-size='9' fill='#6b6859'>有意义</text><text x='220' y='140' text-anchor='end' fill='#6e8a73'>Accuracy</text><text x='220' y='154' text-anchor='end' font-weight='400' font-size='9' fill='#6b6859'>准确</text><text x='250' y='240' text-anchor='middle' fill='#d4a948'>Knowledge</text><text x='250' y='253' text-anchor='middle' fill='#d4a948'>Limits</text><text x='250' y='267' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='400' font-size='9' fill='#6b6859'>知识边界</text><text x='350' y='240' text-anchor='middle' fill='#0d2240'>Confidence</text><text x='350' y='253' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='400' font-size='9' fill='#6b6859'>置信度</text></g></svg>

H05-trust-calibration.caption: 信任校准 — 用户感知信任应与 AI 实际可靠度一致。
H05-trust-calibration.alt: 信任校准散点图 — x 轴实际可靠度，y 轴感知信任，理想为对角线；过度信任在上方、信任不足在下方。
H05-trust-calibration.content: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 320' role='img' aria-label='Trust Calibration'><rect width='600' height='320' fill='#f7f6f3'/><g font-family='Inter, sans-serif'><text x='300' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' fill='#6b6859'>TRUST CALIBRATION</text><text x='300' y='50' text-anchor='middle' font-size='15' font-weight='700' fill='#0d2240'>感知信任 ≈ 实际可靠度</text></g><line x1='120' y1='270' x2='520' y2='270' stroke='#6b6859' stroke-width='1.5'/><line x1='120' y1='80' x2='120' y2='270' stroke='#6b6859' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='320' y='295' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='#6b6859' font-family='Inter, sans-serif'>AI 实际可靠度 →</text><text x='105' y='175' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='#6b6859' font-family='Inter, sans-serif' transform='rotate(-90 105 175)'>用户感知信任 →</text><line x1='120' y1='270' x2='520' y2='80' stroke='#0d2240' stroke-width='2' stroke-dasharray='6 4'/><text x='510' y='75' text-anchor='end' font-size='10' fill='#0d2240' font-weight='700' font-family='Inter, sans-serif'>理想 · 校准</text><g fill='#c46a5e'><circle cx='180' cy='110' r='5'/><circle cx='220' cy='120' r='5'/><circle cx='260' cy='130' r='5'/></g><text x='220' y='100' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='#c46a5e' font-weight='700' font-family='Inter, sans-serif'>过度信任（危险）</text><g fill='#4a7ca6'><circle cx='400' cy='240' r='5'/><circle cx='440' cy='235' r='5'/><circle cx='480' cy='225' r='5'/></g><text x='440' y='262' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='#4a7ca6' font-weight='700' font-family='Inter, sans-serif'>信任不足（浪费）</text><g fill='#6e8a73'><circle cx='250' cy='195' r='5'/><circle cx='320' cy='175' r='5'/><circle cx='380' cy='145' r='5'/></g></svg>

H07-prompt-engineering-ux.caption: Prompt 工程的四要素结构：角色 + 上下文 + 任务 + 格式。
H07-prompt-engineering-ux.alt: Prompt 结构图 — 四个堆叠模块：Role / Context / Task / Format。
H07-prompt-engineering-ux.content: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 320' role='img' aria-label='Prompt Engineering UX'><rect width='600' height='320' fill='#f7f6f3'/><g font-family='Inter, sans-serif'><text x='300' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' fill='#6b6859'>PROMPT ENGINEERING · STRUCTURE</text><text x='300' y='50' text-anchor='middle' font-size='15' font-weight='700' fill='#0d2240'>Role + Context + Task + Format</text></g><g font-family='Inter, sans-serif'><rect x='150' y='80' width='300' height='50' rx='6' fill='#0d2240'/><text x='170' y='100' font-size='12' font-weight='700' fill='#d4a948'>Role · 角色</text><text x='170' y='118' font-size='11' fill='#fff'>例：你是资深 UX 设计师……</text><rect x='150' y='140' width='300' height='50' rx='6' fill='#4a7ca6'/><text x='170' y='160' font-size='12' font-weight='700' fill='#fff'>Context · 上下文</text><text x='170' y='178' font-size='11' fill='#fff'>例：C 端产品 / 移动端优先……</text><rect x='150' y='200' width='300' height='50' rx='6' fill='#6e8a73'/><text x='170' y='220' font-size='12' font-weight='700' fill='#fff'>Task · 任务</text><text x='170' y='238' font-size='11' fill='#fff'>例：评估首页转化路径……</text><rect x='150' y='260' width='300' height='50' rx='6' fill='#d4a948'/><text x='170' y='280' font-size='12' font-weight='700' fill='#0d2240'>Format · 格式</text><text x='170' y='298' font-size='11' fill='#0d2240'>例：Markdown 表格 + 优先级</text></g><text x='75' y='200' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='#6b6859' font-family='Inter, sans-serif' transform='rotate(-90 75 200)'>清晰度逐层递增 →</text></svg>

H08-graceful-ai-failure.caption: AI 优雅失败的四级阶梯：失败 → 坦白 → 提供替代 → 转人工。
H08-graceful-ai-failure.alt: AI 优雅失败阶梯 — 四级台阶向下显示从 AI 失败到转人工的降级路径。
H08-graceful-ai-failure.content: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 320' role='img' aria-label='Graceful AI Failure'><defs><marker id='fa' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='5' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='#6b6859'/></marker></defs><rect width='600' height='320' fill='#f7f6f3'/><g font-family='Inter, sans-serif'><text x='300' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' fill='#6b6859'>GRACEFUL AI FAILURE</text><text x='300' y='50' text-anchor='middle' font-size='15' font-weight='700' fill='#0d2240'>优雅降级 · 四级阶梯</text></g><g font-family='Inter, sans-serif'><rect x='60' y='90' width='140' height='50' rx='6' fill='#c46a5e'/><text x='130' y='112' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12' font-weight='700' fill='#fff'>1. AI 失败</text><text x='130' y='128' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='#fff'>给不出答案</text><rect x='180' y='150' width='140' height='50' rx='6' fill='#d4a948'/><text x='250' y='172' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12' font-weight='700' fill='#fff'>2. 坦白</text><text x='250' y='188' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='#fff'>我不确定 / 我不知道</text><rect x='300' y='210' width='140' height='50' rx='6' fill='#4a7ca6'/><text x='370' y='232' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12' font-weight='700' fill='#fff'>3. 提供替代</text><text x='370' y='248' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='#fff'>相关结果 / 搜索建议</text><rect x='420' y='260' width='140' height='50' rx='6' fill='#6e8a73'/><text x='490' y='282' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12' font-weight='700' fill='#fff'>4. 转人工</text><text x='490' y='298' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='#fff'>Hand off to human</text></g><g stroke='#6b6859' stroke-width='1.5' fill='none'><path d='M 200 140 L 200 150' marker-end='url(#fa)'/><path d='M 320 200 L 320 210' marker-end='url(#fa)'/><path d='M 440 250 L 440 260' marker-end='url(#fa)'/></g></svg>

I03-nudge-theory.caption: 助推 — 默认选项被突出，opt-out 通道弱化；与 opt-in 相反。
I03-nudge-theory.alt: 助推选项卡 — 默认勾选的选项高亮，退出选项弱化；与 opt-in 表单形成对比。

corp-apple.caption: Apple — 由 Jony Ive 时代奠定的工业设计语言。

corp-google.caption: Google — Material Design 第三代 + Gemini AI 体验。

corp-microsoft.caption: Microsoft — Fluent 2 + Inclusive Design + Human-AI Interaction 18 条。

corp-meta.caption: Meta — 从 Facebook 设计到 Reality Labs 的空间体验。

corp-ibm.caption: IBM — Enterprise Design Thinking + Carbon Design System。

corp-airbnb.caption: Airbnb — DLS 设计语言系统 + 2024 Founder Mode 重设计。

corp-netflix.caption: Netflix — A/B 测试驱动 + 高度对齐、松耦合文化。

corp-spotify.caption: Spotify — Encore Design System + Squad 模型起源地。

corp-adobe.caption: Adobe — Spectrum Design System + Firefly 生成式 AI。

corp-atlassian.caption: Atlassian — ADS 开源设计系统 + Rovo AI 工作图谱。

corp-figma.caption: Figma — 协作设计标杆 + Figma Make 生成式原型。

corp-notion.caption: Notion — 极简内嵌一致性 + Notion AI 全工作流。

corp-openai.caption: OpenAI — ChatGPT 对话 UX 设定了 AI 时代默认范式。

corp-anthropic.caption: Anthropic — Mike Krieger 加入 + Constitutional AI 设计哲学。

corp-bytedance-feishu.caption: 字节飞书 — Semi Design 开源 + 智能伙伴 Aily。

corp-bytedance-douyin.caption: 字节抖音 / TikTok — 沉浸式 Feed UX 与 AI 推荐合体。

corp-alibaba-ant.caption: 阿里 / 蚂蚁 — Ant Design 全球 Top 3 开源设计系统 + 鹿班。

corp-tencent-cdc.caption: 腾讯 CDC / ISUX / TGideas / 微信 — 张小龙"用完即走"哲学。

corp-meituan.caption: 美团 — MTD 与骑手 / 商户多端复杂场景设计。

corp-xiaomi.caption: 小米 — MIUI → HyperOS 全场景 + SU7 智能座舱。

corp-jd.caption: 京东 JD — JDC 设计中心 + NutUI 开源 + 言犀大模型。

paradigm-overview.caption: 用户体验三层结构在 AI 时代的衰减率：认知层放大、方法层升级、工艺层让位、新涌现 AI 原生范式。

A12-von-restorff.caption: 群体中独特的元素最容易被记住（隔离效应）。
A12-von-restorff.alt: 冯·雷斯托夫效应示意图 — 一排相同的灰色方块中一个金色方块突出
A12-von-restorff.content: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 320' role='img' aria-label='Von Restorff Effect diagram'><rect width='600' height='320' fill='#f7f6f3'/><g font-family='Inter, sans-serif'><text x='300' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' fill='#6b6859'>VON RESTORFF EFFECT · 1933</text><text x='300' y='52' text-anchor='middle' font-size='17' font-weight='700' fill='#0d2240'>差异 = 记忆</text><rect x='70' y='140' width='55' height='55' rx='6' fill='#6b6859' opacity='0.4'/><rect x='140' y='140' width='55' height='55' rx='6' fill='#6b6859' opacity='0.4'/><rect x='210' y='140' width='55' height='55' rx='6' fill='#6b6859' opacity='0.4'/><rect x='275' y='125' width='75' height='85' rx='8' fill='#d4a948'/><text x='312' y='173' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' fill='#f7f6f3' font-weight='700'>NEW</text><rect x='365' y='140' width='55' height='55' rx='6' fill='#6b6859' opacity='0.4'/><rect x='435' y='140' width='55' height='55' rx='6' fill='#6b6859' opacity='0.4'/><rect x='505' y='140' width='55' height='55' rx='6' fill='#6b6859' opacity='0.4'/><path d='M312,108 L312,118 M308,115 L312,118 L316,115' stroke='#d4a948' stroke-width='2' fill='none'/><text x='312' y='100' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='#d4a948' font-weight='700'>注意力聚焦</text><text x='300' y='240' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='#6b6859'>颜色 / 大小 / 形状的差异都能触发隔离效应</text><text x='300' y='270' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='#0d2240' font-weight='700'>设计应用：主 CTA、限时标、新功能徽章</text><text x='300' y='295' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='#c46a5e'>警告：差异化太多 = 全部都不重要</text></g></svg>

A15-goal-gradient.caption: 越接近目标，行动力越强 — 进度条加速冲刺效应。
A15-goal-gradient.alt: 目标梯度效应示意图 — 进度越接近终点，曲线斜率越陡
A15-goal-gradient.content: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 320' role='img' aria-label='Goal Gradient Effect diagram'><defs><marker id='arG' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='5' refY='5' markerWidth='6' markerHeight='6' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='#6b6859'/></marker></defs><rect width='600' height='320' fill='#f7f6f3'/><g font-family='Inter, sans-serif'><text x='300' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' fill='#6b6859'>GOAL-GRADIENT EFFECT · 1932</text><text x='300' y='52' text-anchor='middle' font-size='17' font-weight='700' fill='#0d2240'>越接近目标 → 努力越大</text><line x1='80' y1='250' x2='540' y2='250' stroke='#6b6859' stroke-width='1.2' marker-end='url(#arG)'/><line x1='80' y1='250' x2='80' y2='80' stroke='#6b6859' stroke-width='1.2' marker-end='url(#arG)'/><text x='540' y='270' font-size='11' fill='#6b6859'>距离目标</text><text x='70' y='80' font-size='11' fill='#6b6859' text-anchor='end'>努力 / 速度</text><path d='M80,235 Q200,225 300,210 Q400,180 460,130 Q490,105 510,90' fill='none' stroke='#0d2240' stroke-width='2.5'/><line x1='510' y1='80' x2='510' y2='260' stroke='#d4a948' stroke-width='1.5' stroke-dasharray='4 4'/><text x='510' y='75' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='#d4a948' font-weight='700'>目标</text><text x='510' y='280' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='#6b6859'>100%</text><text x='80' y='280' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='#6b6859'>0%</text><rect x='180' y='150' width='250' height='22' rx='11' fill='#6b6859' opacity='0.2'/><rect x='180' y='150' width='200' height='22' rx='11' fill='#6e8a73'/><text x='305' y='166' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='#f7f6f3' font-weight='700'>已完成 80% · 冲刺！</text><text x='300' y='305' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='#6b6859'>应用：进度条预填 / 集章卡 / 临门一脚提示</text></g></svg>

A16-cognitive-load.caption: 认知负荷分三类：内在、外在、相关 — 减少外在负荷是设计师的核心任务。
A16-cognitive-load.alt: 认知负荷理论示意图 — 三个同心圆代表内在、外在、相关三类负荷
A16-cognitive-load.content: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 320' role='img' aria-label='Cognitive Load Theory diagram'><rect width='600' height='320' fill='#f7f6f3'/><g font-family='Inter, sans-serif'><text x='300' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' fill='#6b6859'>COGNITIVE LOAD THEORY · 1988</text><text x='300' y='52' text-anchor='middle' font-size='17' font-weight='700' fill='#0d2240'>认知总容量 = 内在 + 外在 + 相关</text><circle cx='235' cy='185' r='95' fill='#c46a5e' opacity='0.2' stroke='#c46a5e' stroke-width='2'/><circle cx='235' cy='185' r='65' fill='#d4a948' opacity='0.3' stroke='#d4a948' stroke-width='2'/><circle cx='235' cy='185' r='32' fill='#6e8a73' opacity='0.5' stroke='#6e8a73' stroke-width='2'/><text x='235' y='183' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='#0d2240' font-weight='700'>内在</text><text x='235' y='196' text-anchor='middle' font-size='9' fill='#0d2240'>Intrinsic</text><text x='235' y='140' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='#d4a948' font-weight='700'>相关 Germane</text><text x='235' y='250' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='#c46a5e' font-weight='700'>外在 Extraneous</text><g font-size='10' fill='#6b6859'><line x1='340' y1='135' x2='400' y2='110' stroke='#6e8a73' stroke-width='1'/><text x='405' y='112' fill='#6e8a73' font-weight='700'>内在 · 任务本身的难度</text><text x='405' y='126'>例：理解一个新概念</text><line x1='340' y1='180' x2='400' y2='175' stroke='#d4a948' stroke-width='1'/><text x='405' y='177' fill='#d4a948' font-weight='700'>相关 · 用于构建心智模型</text><text x='405' y='191'>例：联想、举一反三</text><line x1='340' y1='230' x2='400' y2='240' stroke='#c46a5e' stroke-width='1'/><text x='405' y='242' fill='#c46a5e' font-weight='700'>外在 · 设计造成的额外负担</text><text x='405' y='256'>例：丑界面、找不到按钮</text></g><text x='300' y='305' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='#0d2240' font-weight='700'>设计师的任务 = 砍掉外在负荷</text></g></svg>

A23-sunk-cost.caption: 因已投入的不可挽回成本而继续投入，是一种非理性偏差。
A23-sunk-cost.alt: 沉没成本谬误示意图 — 一个水桶往破裂的管子里继续倒钱
A23-sunk-cost.content: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 320' role='img' aria-label='Sunk Cost Fallacy diagram'><rect width='600' height='320' fill='#f7f6f3'/><g font-family='Inter, sans-serif'><text x='300' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' fill='#6b6859'>SUNK COST FALLACY</text><text x='300' y='52' text-anchor='middle' font-size='17' font-weight='700' fill='#0d2240'>已花的钱无法收回，却让人继续投</text><path d='M120,100 L210,100 L195,180 L135,180 Z' fill='#d4a948' opacity='0.5' stroke='#d4a948' stroke-width='2'/><text x='165' y='150' fill='#c46a5e' font-weight='700'>已破损</text><path d='M310,290 Q330,300 350,310' stroke='#d4a948' stroke-width='2' fill='none' stroke-dasharray='2 3'/><circle cx='340' cy='305' r='3' fill='#d4a948'/><circle cx='355' cy='313' r='3' fill='#d4a948'/><text x='320' y='185' font-size='11' fill='#6b6859' font-style='italic'>"已经投了这么多，</text><text x='320' y='200' font-size='11' fill='#6b6859' font-style='italic'>不能现在放弃..."</text><rect x='460' y='110' width='110' height='150' rx='6' fill='#f7f6f3' stroke='#0d2240' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='515' y='135' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='#0d2240' font-weight='700'>常见场景</text><g font-size='10' fill='#6b6859'><text x='470' y='160'>· 看烂电影看到底</text><text x='470' y='180'>· 失败项目硬撑</text><text x='470' y='200'>· 充错值的会员</text><text x='470' y='220'>· 不合适的恋情</text></g><text x='515' y='250' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='#c46a5e' font-weight='700'>理性 = 只看未来收益</text></g></svg>

A24-mere-exposure.caption: 重复接触会让人对事物产生偏好 — 熟悉本身即正向情感。
A24-mere-exposure.alt: 纯粹曝光效应示意图 — 横轴为曝光次数，纵轴为喜爱度，呈现先升后趋稳的曲线
A24-mere-exposure.content: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 320' role='img' aria-label='Mere Exposure Effect diagram'><defs><marker id='arME' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='5' refY='5' markerWidth='6' markerHeight='6' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='#6b6859'/></marker></defs><rect width='600' height='320' fill='#f7f6f3'/><g font-family='Inter, sans-serif'><text x='300' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' fill='#6b6859'>MERE EXPOSURE EFFECT · ZAJONC 1968</text><text x='300' y='52' text-anchor='middle' font-size='17' font-weight='700' fill='#0d2240'>看得越多 → 越喜欢</text><line x1='80' y1='250' x2='540' y2='250' stroke='#6b6859' stroke-width='1.2' marker-end='url(#arME)'/><line x1='80' y1='250' x2='80' y2='80' stroke='#6b6859' stroke-width='1.2' marker-end='url(#arME)'/><text x='540' y='270' font-size='11' fill='#6b6859'>曝光次数</text><text x='70' y='80' font-size='11' fill='#6b6859' text-anchor='end'>喜爱度</text><path d='M80,235 Q140,210 200,170 Q280,130 360,115 Q440,108 520,110' fill='none' stroke='#0d2240' stroke-width='2.5'/><circle cx='110' cy='225' r='5' fill='#c46a5e'/><text x='110' y='220' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='#c46a5e' font-weight='700'>陌生</text><circle cx='240' cy='150' r='5' fill='#d4a948'/><text x='240' y='140' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='#d4a948' font-weight='700'>熟悉</text><circle cx='450' cy='110' r='5' fill='#6e8a73'/><text x='450' y='100' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='#6e8a73' font-weight='700'>喜爱</text><line x1='480' y1='100' x2='540' y2='100' stroke='#6b6859' stroke-width='1' stroke-dasharray='3 3'/><text x='510' y='95' text-anchor='middle' font-size='9' fill='#6b6859'>趋于饱和</text><text x='300' y='290' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='#6b6859'>应用：品牌反复曝光、字体熟悉度、UI 一致性</text><text x='300' y='308' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='#c46a5e'>但过曝 → 厌倦（U 型反转）</text></g></svg>

C02-affordance.caption: 可供性 vs 示能符：门把手暗示「拉」、平板暗示「推」。
C02-affordance.alt: 两扇门对比：左边门把（拉），右边平板（推），展示物体形态如何提示用法。
C02-affordance.content: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 320' role='img' aria-label='Affordance Signifier'><rect width='600' height='320' fill='#f7f6f3'/><g font-family='Inter, sans-serif'><text x='300' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' fill='#6b6859'>AFFORDANCE vs SIGNIFIER</text><text x='300' y='50' text-anchor='middle' font-size='16' font-weight='700' fill='#0d2240'>形态如何告诉你怎么用</text></g><g transform='translate(100,80)'><rect width='150' height='190' fill='#fff' stroke='#0d2240' stroke-width='2.5'/><circle cx='30' cy='105' r='10' fill='none' stroke='#0d2240' stroke-width='3'/><rect x='15' y='115' width='30' height='8' fill='#0d2240'/><text x='75' y='220' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12' font-weight='700' fill='#0d2240' font-family='Inter, sans-serif'>有把手 = 拉</text><text x='75' y='238' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='#6b6859' font-family='Inter, sans-serif'>圆把手是「示能符」</text></g><g transform='translate(350,80)'><rect width='150' height='190' fill='#fff' stroke='#0d2240' stroke-width='2.5'/><rect x='25' y='90' width='100' height='30' fill='#c46a5e'/><text x='75' y='110' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' font-weight='700' fill='#fff' font-family='Inter, sans-serif'>PUSH</text><text x='75' y='220' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12' font-weight='700' fill='#0d2240' font-family='Inter, sans-serif'>平板 + 文字 = 推</text><text x='75' y='238' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='#6b6859' font-family='Inter, sans-serif'>平板是「可供性」</text></g><text x='300' y='300' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='#6b6859' font-family='Inter, sans-serif' font-style='italic'>可供性 = 物体可能的用法；示能符 = 暗示用法的可见线索</text></svg>

C15-consistency.caption: 一致性原则：同类组件保持同样外观和行为；混乱版本会破坏信任。
C15-consistency.alt: 左：一致的两个按钮 / 右：两个外观不同的按钮表示破坏一致性。
C15-consistency.content: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 320' role='img' aria-label='Consistency'><rect width='600' height='320' fill='#f7f6f3'/><g font-family='Inter, sans-serif'><text x='300' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' fill='#6b6859'>CONSISTENCY · 一致性原则</text><text x='300' y='50' text-anchor='middle' font-size='16' font-weight='700' fill='#0d2240'>同类操作 = 同样外观</text></g><g transform='translate(60,90)'><rect width='220' height='180' fill='#fff' stroke='#6e8a73' stroke-width='2' rx='6'/><text x='110' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12' font-weight='700' fill='#6e8a73' font-family='Inter, sans-serif'>✓ 一致</text><rect x='40' y='55' width='140' height='40' rx='6' fill='#0d2240'/><text x='110' y='80' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' fill='#fff' font-family='Inter, sans-serif' font-weight='600'>提交</text><rect x='40' y='115' width='140' height='40' rx='6' fill='#0d2240'/><text x='110' y='140' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' fill='#fff' font-family='Inter, sans-serif' font-weight='600'>保存</text></g><g transform='translate(320,90)'><rect width='220' height='180' fill='#fff' stroke='#c46a5e' stroke-width='2' rx='6'/><text x='110' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12' font-weight='700' fill='#c46a5e' font-family='Inter, sans-serif'>✗ 混乱</text><rect x='40' y='55' width='140' height='40' rx='6' fill='#0d2240'/><text x='110' y='80' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' fill='#fff' font-family='Inter, sans-serif' font-weight='600'>提交</text><rect x='30' y='115' width='160' height='32' rx='16' fill='none' stroke='#c46a5e' stroke-width='2'/><text x='110' y='136' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12' fill='#c46a5e' font-family='Inter, sans-serif' font-weight='400' font-style='italic'>SAVE</text></g><text x='300' y='295' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='#6b6859' font-family='Inter, sans-serif' font-style='italic'>用户大脑要重学一次 = 心智成本 + 信任流失</text></svg>

D09-five-user-rule.caption: Nielsen 经典曲线：5 名用户即可发现约 85% 可用性问题。
D09-five-user-rule.alt: 指数曲线，横轴用户数 1-15，纵轴问题发现率，曲线在 n=5 处接近 85%
